examples: Peter had no sinking, he had one feeling only, gladness; and he gnashed his pretty teeth with joy.
Next morning, Clara shed hot tears at parting from the beloved place, where such gladness had been hers.
Why do they serve with gladness?
The mirrors of my house filled me with such a sense of gladness that a room without one struck me as a dark cell.
Each painting and sculpture seemed to have waited for my arrival, dressed in their finest draperies and gilded frames, like flags in an endless procession of gladness.
